title: camissonia cheiranthifolia subsp. suffruticosa
intro: Camissonia cheiranthifolia subsp. suffruticosa, also known as the desert star or desert evening primrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oenothera genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral and antifungal activities. Camissonia cheiranthifolia subsp. suffruticosa is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made from its leaves, flowers, and roots.
